description: Standard commercial loan application with borrower, amount, collateral, and guarantors

COMMERCIAL LOAN APPLICATION
Application Date: 2026-02-14
Applicant Legal Name: Prairie Ridge Manufacturing LLC
DBA: Prairie Ridge Components
EIN: XX-XXX8421
Entity Type: Limited Liability Company
NAICS: 332710 Machine Shops
Principal Address: 4100 Foundry Road, Des Moines, IA 50309
Contact: Elena Morris, CFO
Email: emorris@prairieridge.example
Phone: 515-555-0198
Years in Business: 12
Annual Revenue: $18,750,000
Requested Facility: Term Loan
Requested Amount: $4,250,000
Requested Term: 84 months
Purpose: Purchase CNC equipment and refinance existing equipment debt
Collateral: CNC equipment, machinery, and all business assets
Guarantors: Elena Morris; Daniel Morris
Existing Bank Relationship: Yes
Relationship Manager: Aaron Patel
Ownership: Elena Morris 60%, Daniel Morris 40%
Beneficial Owners Listed: 2
Total Assets: $12,400,000
Total Liabilities: $6,100,000
Net Worth: $6,300,000
Signed by Elena Morris, Chief Financial Officer
